text:
Created attachment 209734
patch to update two ports

- update of 2 ports sharing the same distribution: 0.06 --> 0.08
Changes: https://github.com/openxpki/libscep/commits/develop
- Tested with:
12.1-RELEASE-p1 amd64
poudriere 3.3.2_1
perl 5.30.1
pkg 1.12.0
ssl=base
- Buil-in perl tests (for p5-Crypt-LibSCEP) in a clean jail of poudriere say: "PASS".
